title: hub_metadata
description: Shared metadata block embedded in every hub item (model, assistant, mcp-server).

added_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the item was first merged into the catalog.

contributor.description: GitHub handle (without the leading @) of the PR author.

verified.description: true = added by the ziee-ai team; false = community-contributed.

min_ziee_version.description: Optional minimum ziee server version (semver). Items requiring a newer server are surfaced as Incompatible in the hub UI.
